description:
Advances: specled.api_boundary

`mix spec.suggest_binding` proposes module names that are not real Elixir module names for Mix tasks whose filenames contain dots.

## Repro

Run `mix spec.suggest_binding --fail-on-missing` on the current branch. Observe proposals like:

    - "Mix.Tasks.Spec.suggestBinding"
    - "Mix.Tasks.Spec.check"
    - "Mix.Tasks.Spec.cover.test"

These are bogus. The real module names are:

    - Mix.Tasks.Spec.SuggestBinding
    - Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check
    - Mix.Tasks.Spec.Cover.Test

## Root cause

`lib/mix/tasks/spec.suggest_binding.ex`, `file_to_module_name/1`:

```elixir
path
|> Path.rootname(".ex")
|> String.replace_prefix("lib/", "")
|> String.split("/")
|> Enum.map(&Macro.camelize/1)
|> Enum.join(".")
```

Splits on `/` only. A filename segment like `spec.suggest_binding` contains a `.`, and `Macro.camelize/1` on a dotted string does not capitalize the piece after the dot the way the module-name convention requires — it yields `Spec.suggestBinding`. Same failure for `spec.check` -> `Spec.check` and `spec.cover.test` -> `Spec.cover.test`.

## Fix sketch

Split on `.` inside each path segment first, camelize each dotted sub-part, then rejoin with `.`:

```elixir
path
|> Path.rootname(".ex")
|> String.replace_prefix("lib/", "")
|> String.split("/")
|> Enum.flat_map(&String.split(&1, "."))
|> Enum.map(&Macro.camelize/1)
|> Enum.join(".")
```

## Tests to add

- Fixture subject with surface `lib/mix/tasks/foo.bar_baz.ex` — proposal should render `Mix.Tasks.Foo.BarBaz`, not `Mix.Tasks.foo.barBaz`.
- Nested dotted task `lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex` — should render `Mix.Tasks.Spec.Cover.Test`.

## Impact

Agents pasting the proposal verbatim get unresolvable bindings. api_boundary / implementation tiers then emit `branch_guard_dangling_binding` on the first `mix spec.check` because the module atom does not exist.

IMPLEMENTED
Session: eacf212e-8533-47f8-bf0b-6d1a12145dca
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eacf212e-8533-47f8-bf0b-6d1a12145dca.jsonl

Commit: b8b5b96caad92f06df2269879de13f38cbf521b5
Branch: specled_-kox/fix-dotted-mix-task-camelize (worktree at /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-kox)
Files touched:
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.suggest_binding.ex
- test/mix/tasks/spec_suggest_binding_test.exs
Tests added:
- Mix.Tasks.Spec.SuggestBindingTest "camelizes dotted Mix task filenames into valid module names"
Verification stubs flipped: none (api_boundary spec's spec.suggest_binding stub was already execute: true)

Summary: file_to_module_name/1 in spec.suggest_binding.ex now flat-maps an extra String.split(segment, ".") before Macro.camelize/1. This resolves the bug where dotted Mix task filenames (e.g. lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex) produced invalid module names like "Mix.Tasks.Spec.cover.test" — they now correctly render as "Mix.Tasks.Spec.Cover.Test". Satisfies specled.api_boundary.suggest_binding_proposal_only by producing proposals that match real module atoms. Full mix test suite (528 tests) and mix spec.check both pass clean.

title: fix: spec.suggest_binding miscamelizes dotted Mix task filenames
